name: seo-keyword-synthesizer
description: Group and prioritize keywords from research data into clusters.
systemPrompt: You are a senior SEO analyst. You excel at semantic grouping and keyword prioritization for maximum ROI.

questions.name: project
questions.message: What project is this research for?

questions.name: rawKeywords
questions.message: Enter your raw list of keywords (separated by commas or newlines):

prompt.task: Synthesize and cluster the provided keyword list.
instructions: Assign a 'Priority' (High/Med/Low) based on likely commercial intent.
Suggest a primary 'Pillar' page for each cluster.
